gold.title: useImageUpload
gold.reason: Handles drag-and-drop, file preview, and upload callback — directly enables polished image upload UIs common in profile, media, and CMS sections of real sites.

gold.title: useAutoScroll
gold.reason: Drives auto-scrolling chat and feed UIs — essential utility for AI assistant and live-feed product demos on modern SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: usePagination
gold.reason: Full pagination logic with ellipsis handling — production-grade utility needed by virtually every data-heavy page or blog listing section.

gold.title: Loop Animation Hook
gold.reason: Framer Motion loop animation controller — powers animated hero text cycles and rotating feature callouts; directly visual in impact unlike most hooks.

gold.title: useCopyToClipboard
gold.reason: Copy-to-clipboard with state feedback — essential for code snippets, API key displays, and referral links on SaaS and developer-facing sites.

gold.title: useMediaQuery
gold.reason: SSR-safe media query hook — foundational utility for responsive behavior in any production component; broadly applicable across all site types.

gold.title: useFileInput
gold.reason: File input with accept filter, max size validation, and file name state — directly supports styled file upload components used in onboarding and settings pages.

gold.title: useMousePosition
gold.reason: Mouse position tracking with configurable element scope — enables premium interactive effects (spotlight, magnetic buttons, parallax) seen on high-end marketing sites.

gold.title: Use Scroll
gold.reason: Scroll threshold detection for sticky nav and scroll-triggered UI — directly powers common header transparency and back-to-top patterns on virtually every site.

gold.title: useSliderWithInput
gold.reason: Synchronized slider + number input state — enables polished pricing and range filter controls common on SaaS pricing and filter pages.

silver.title: useTextareaResize
silver.reason: Auto-resizing textarea with min-rows support — useful for contact forms and chat inputs but limited to one specific input type.

silver.title: useExpandable
silver.reason: Expandable/collapsible state management — solid utility for FAQ accordions and read-more sections common on landing pages.

silver.title: useAutoResizeTextarea
silver.reason: Auto-resize textarea via ref — simpler variant of useTextareaResize; useful but duplicative and narrowly scoped.

silver.title: useTags
silver.reason: Tag management with color support and max limit — useful for filter UIs and tag inputs in CMS and search-heavy sites.

silver.title: useCharacterLimit
silver.reason: Character count with limit enforcement for inputs — commonly needed in contact forms and profile pages.

silver.title: useDebounce
silver.reason: Standard debounce hook for value changes — essential utility for search inputs but extremely common and available in many libraries.

silver.title: useClickOutside
silver.reason: Click-outside detection for modals and dropdowns — widely needed but a near-duplicate of useOnClickOutside in the same folder.

silver.title: useDebounceCallback
silver.reason: Debounce for callback functions via lodash — useful for search and input handlers, slightly more flexible than value debounce.

silver.title: useDimensions
silver.reason: Debounced element dimensions via ResizeObserver — useful for responsive layout calculations in complex animated components.

silver.title: useScreenSize
silver.reason: Window dimensions tracker — simple but broadly applicable for responsive logic not covered by CSS alone.

silver.title: useItemOverflow
silver.reason: Detects overflowing items in a container — useful for '+N more' patterns in tag lists and nav items but niche in scope.

silver.title: useBoolean
silver.reason: Boolean state with toggle/set helpers — convenient shorthand but trivially simple; most developers inline this logic.

silver.title: useToggle
silver.reason: Toggle boolean state with optional default — overlaps heavily with useBoolean; useful but redundant pairing.

bronze.title: useElasticLineEvents
bronze.reason: Elastic line physics mouse events — highly specialized animation hook for specific SVG line effects; not broadly applicable.

bronze.title: useMousePositionRef
bronze.reason: Ref-based mouse position tracker to avoid re-renders — micro-optimization variant useful only in performance-critical animation code.

bronze.title: useMouseVector
bronze.reason: Mouse movement vector/velocity tracking — very niche; only useful for physics-based cursor animations.

bronze.title: useOnClickOutside
bronze.reason: Duplicate click-outside hook — near-identical to useClickOutside in the same folder; redundant.

bronze.title: Use Mobile
bronze.reason: Single breakpoint mobile check — extremely minimal; useMediaQuery covers this and more.

bronze.title: useCounter
bronze.reason: Increment/decrement counter state — trivially simple utility with very limited standalone website-building value.

bronze.title: useInterval
bronze.reason: setInterval wrapper with cleanup — low-level primitive rarely needed directly when building marketing sites.

bronze.title: useIsomorphicLayoutEffect
bronze.reason: SSR-safe layout effect shim — internal utility dependency, not a component a developer would consciously choose or evaluate.

bronze.title: useTimeout
bronze.reason: setTimeout wrapper with cleanup — similar to useInterval; too low-level to provide direct marketing site value.

bronze.title: useUnmount
bronze.reason: Cleanup callback on component unmount — internal lifecycle utility; no visual or marketing value.
